global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a clear promotional message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares with a call to action.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'DriftPass' in bold, modern typography, positioned prominently at the top center.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' is located at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A simple geometric shape, possibly an oval and a rectangle, is placed in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: The text reads 'Fly smarter Special fares today' in a clear, legible font, centered in the lower half of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is displayed in a bold font at the bottom left, drawing attention to the offer.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Claim reward' is positioned at the bottom right, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: This element is not clearly defined but appears to be a small icon or label.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, DriftPass logo, promotional text, price tag.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the UGC icon, with the promotional text in the center and the price tag and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter Special fares today, €19.99, Claim reward, DriftPass, UGC
